hero.name: SAVVANI VENKATA JASWANTH
hero.aboutBrief: Highly motivated B.Com (Computers) graduate specializing in high-performance Python backends, LLM integrations, and elegant interface craftsmanship.

video.title: Behind the Code: Engineering the Future
video.description: A short cinematic preview of my engineering workflows, automated scripting systems, and AI integration pipelines.

about.story:
I am Savani Jaswanth, a dedicated Python and AI Developer who bridges the gap between structured commercial intelligence and high-execution technical architectures. Graduating with a B.Com in Computer Applications, I pivoted deeply into core software engineering, focusing on Python systems, machine learning pipelines, and responsive interactive products.

I design backends with FastAPI and Flask, architect flexible real-time schemas with cloud stores, and engineer intelligent LLM applications using modern prompt strategies and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). To me, code is not just instructions—it is a medium for crafting high-fidelity digital solutions.

timeline.title: AI Integration & Python Developer
timeline.description: Built custom AI Agents using Gemini and OpenAI APIs, designed autonomous file automation scripts, and established scalable API backends.

timeline.title: B.Com in Computer Applications
timeline.description: Acquired critical business insight, data intelligence, and analytical skills, blending enterprise models with computer systems.

timeline.title: AI Developer Workshop & Hackathon
timeline.description: Engaged in hands-on LLM orchestrations, RAG architecture patterns, and prompt safety alignment guidelines.

projects.title: School ERP System
projects.description: A comprehensive institutional suite managing enrollment lifecycles, class schedules, grading models, and performance logs with robust security.

projects.title: AI Resume Analyzer
projects.description: A premium text analytical tool utilizing Gemini models to review resumes, score industry keywords, map role requirements, and output real-time alignment feedback.

projects.title: Cinematic Portfolio Web App
projects.description: An elegant, Apple-quality portfolio featuring fluid motion, high-end visual curves, glass panels, live resume scoring, and full-stack administration controls.

projects.title: Python Automation Engine
projects.description: An orchestration suite of custom Python tasks that scraps research listings, syncs data records across directories, and automates multi-recipient email updates.
